content: ASP.NET Core MVC e-commerce with Clean Architecture: Repository + Unit of Work for data access, Result<T> pattern for error handling, cookie-based shopping cart, inventory reservation with stored procedures (UPDLOCK/ROWLOCK for race condition prevention), FluentValidation over Data Annotations, Hangfire for background jobs, Serilog for structured logging. KeystoneCommerce demonstrates full admin dashboard with sales analytics, KPIs, chart.js. Area-based organization: Admin/, Customer/, Identity/.
